title: 混合自動化決策規則引擎
deliverables: app/decision_engine.py - 混合自動化決策規則引擎
IF-THEN 規則引擎 (多條件 AND 邏輯)
4 種決策模式: AUTO / ASK / SKIP / BLOCK
優先級系統 (數字越小優先級越高)
內建規則模板 (高信心自動交易 / 大倉位詢問 / 高波動跳過 / 低餘額阻擋)
人類確認機制 (ASK 模式)
features: Multi-condition rule evaluation with AND logic
Four decision modes: AUTO (execute), ASK (human confirm), SKIP (ignore), BLOCK (stop)
Built-in rule templates for common scenarios
Human confirmation workflow for ASK decisions
git_commit: STRATEGY_004: Implement hybrid automated decision engine
